{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Quantum Mind
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Quantum Mind]] is a name [[Prism]] liked being called.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
